description: You are a detective investigating a data destruction case involving a USB drive image. Using Autopsy, analyze the disk image /home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd within a case named 'Deleted_Evidence_2024' (Case Number: 'INV-DEL-001'), employing only the 'File Type Identification' ingest module. Extract all discovered deleted files to /home/ga/Reports/deleted_evidence/ and generate a forensic report at /home/ga/Reports/deleted_evidence_report.txt. The report must document each deleted file on a separate line in the format: FILENAME|INODE_NUMBER|FILE_SIZE_BYTES|MD5_HASH (use 'N/A' if MD5 is unavailable).
